title: Excalibur - Gravestone
body:
[Gravestone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod) in [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) style

back-porting [Excalibur | GraveStone Mod Support](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-gravestone-mod-support) to 1.12.2.

![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ei487onO/images/38f3b61ab888ea2f4f685f6fedcd56d2c726431d.png)
